jobs.job_title: B2C Cold Email Deliverability & Automation Specialist
jobs.description:
Grassfed | Part-Time | Remote | Contract
---
ABOUT GRASSFED
Grass Fed runs cold email campaigns for 100+ real estate agents across the United States. Our model is straightforward: we pull homeowner lists based on simple criteria and get our clients' messages in front of the right people. We're not building complex B2B enrichment stacks or running multi-channel sequences. We do one thing — cold email — and we do it at scale.
